children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Neither the Secretary, nor any other actor, department, or agency of the Federal Government, shall condition the issuance of a loan or loan guarantee under paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of on an air carrier’s or eligible business’s implementation of measures to enter into negotiations with the certified bargaining representative of a craft or class of employees of the air carrier or eligible business under the Railway Labor Act ( et seq.) or the National Labor Relations Act ( et seq.), regarding pay or other terms and conditions of employment.section 9042(b) of this title45 U.S.C. 15129 U.S.C. 151

children.heading: Period of effect
children.label: b Period of effect
children.text: With respect to an air carrier or eligible business to which the loan or loan guarantee is provided under this part, this section shall be in effect with respect to the air carrier or eligible business beginning on the date on which the air carrier or eligible business is first issued such loan or loan guarantee and ending on the date that is 1 year after the loan or loan guarantee is no longer outstanding.
